title: We Give More
description: A curated collection of open-air, wellness, leisure, and community spaces designed to make every day feel easier.
summary: Add a videoSrc and thumbnailSrc to any amenity below and the page will render it automatically.

items.title: Party Lawn
items.shortDescription: A generous lawn for celebrations, gatherings, and evening events.
items.details: A flexible outdoor host space that supports community moments without feeling crowded.

items.title: Amphitheater
items.shortDescription: An open-air gathering space for performances, events, and shared evenings.
items.details: Designed as a lively community zone for cultural moments, casual seating, and outdoor entertainment.

items.title: Outdoor Gym
items.shortDescription: Open-air fitness for quick strength work without leaving the campus.
items.details: A durable activity zone that keeps everyday movement convenient, active, and visible.

items.title: Barbeque
items.shortDescription: A relaxed outdoor corner for weekend grills, family time, and casual hosting.
items.details: Planned as a social amenity where residents can gather, cook, and enjoy open-air evenings.

items.title: Basketball Court
items.shortDescription: A high-energy court for active play, practice sessions, and friendly matches.
items.details: A dedicated sports space that supports fitness, competition, and everyday recreation.

items.title: Birdbath
items.shortDescription: A gentle landscape detail that brings calm, greenery, and bird life closer.
items.details: A nature-led feature that adds softness, movement, and peaceful character to the outdoor spaces.

items.title: Buddha Garden
items.shortDescription: A still garden moment for reflection, meditation, and slower breaks.
items.details: A quiet landscaped pocket designed for pause, calm, and mindful outdoor time.

items.title: Business Lounge
items.shortDescription: A refined lounge setting for focused work, quick meetings, and productive pauses.
items.details: Created for residents who need a calm, premium work-friendly space within the community.

items.title: Camp Fire
items.shortDescription: A warm evening zone for conversations, gatherings, and relaxed outdoor moments.
items.details: Designed as a cozy community feature that brings residents together after sunset.

items.title: Cycle Track
items.shortDescription: A dedicated path for cycling, movement, and everyday outdoor activity.
items.details: A convenient active-living amenity that encourages healthy routines within the campus.

items.title: Football
items.shortDescription: An energetic play zone for casual football games and active weekends.
items.details: A community sports amenity shaped for teamwork, fitness, and outdoor recreation.

items.title: Forest Walk
items.shortDescription: A green immersive zone for slow walks, fresh air, and shaded pauses.
items.details: Layered planting and natural pathways create a softer escape inside the community.

items.shortDescription: A dedicated cricket space for practice, friendly matches, and weekend play.
items.details: A sports amenity planned for families, children, and residents who enjoy active outdoor games.

items.title: Kids Play Area

items.details: Planned for easy supervision, active movement, and everyday neighborhood energy.

items.title: Rock Garden
items.shortDescription: A sculpted landscape pocket with stone textures, greenery, and quiet character.
items.details: A designed garden feature that adds visual depth, calm, and natural richness to the campus.

items.title: Skating Rink
items.shortDescription: A smooth activity zone for skating, movement, and playful recreation.
items.details: A dedicated amenity for children and residents to enjoy active, skill-based outdoor fun.

items.title: Sofa Seating Area
